examples: She had some misgivings about what she was about to do.
There were some misgivings within the ranks of the media too.
Misgivings came; they grew troubled and unhappy; a sigh or two escaped, unawares.
In seeking a second chance from the public, Weiner will have to overcome some voters' misgivings.
But misgivings in Britain about President Bush's foreign policy extend far beyond Blackburn's Muslim community.
